# Secret/var names referenced by .github/workflows and .github/actions.
# Kept in sync by check-workflow-secret-names; GITHUB_TOKEN is implicit.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY # repo scope: changelog drafting in release-prep
GH_NTFY_SUBJECT # repo scope: ntfy notification subject
GH_NTFY_URL # repo scope: ntfy notification endpoint
RULESET_SYNC_TOKEN_ORG # org scope: branch-protection ruleset sync
TEMPLATE_SYNC_ORG # org var: template-sync source org
TEMPLATE_SYNC_TOKEN # org scope: template-sync PR token
TEMPLATE_SYNC_TOKEN_ORG # org scope: release/tag push token
